from dsl import *

    x1 = objects(I, F, T, T)
    x2 = argmax(x1, size)
    x3 = argmin(x1, size)
    x4 = subgrid(x2, I)
    x5 = subgrid(x3, I)
    x6 = width(x4)
    x7 = width(x5)

    x9 = downscale(x4, x8)
